Eramba is documented as mature open-source GRC software with HIPAA support (https://www.eramba.org/)

privileged_info_summary: The task involves creating a HIPAA risk treatment program in Eramba, a real open-source GRC platform that supports HIPAA compliance. The role is Security Management Specialist (O*NET code 13-1199.07), a verified real occupation. The industry is Healthcare. The organization 'Summit Regional Medical Center' is fictional or heavily fictionalized, named similarly to the real Summit Healthcare Regional Medical Center in Show Low, Arizona, which actually operates 101 licensed beds (not the 350 claimed in the task description). The regulatory context (HIPAA, HHS Office for Civil Rights audits) is accurate and real.
